lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: Of courssse, sssome of usss remember the high ssspeech out old massster ssspoke in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I suppose I've never had a chance to speak with most Lizardmen, they're generally quite aggressive.

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: Yesss, we ssspeak the language of war far better. It isss the only way we know of.

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: I know only what my eldersss passssed down. Very little.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long ago since this master left you?

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: Many generationsss have come and gone sssince he walked amongssst usss.

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: K'uhul ajaw isss the name we ssspeak. You manfolk ssspeak a different name.

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: Thisss isss our temple, we don't usssually get many visssitorsss... We make sssacrifice, offeringsss to our massster.

lines.speaker: Kaht B'alam
lines.text: Thisss and that. Whatever out massster desssiresss.
